# Lifecycle hook events

<!-- Code generated by `go generate ./pkg/events`; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Lifecycle hook payloads use `schema_version: 1` and are filtered through the selected `payload` policy before local hooks receive them.

- `metadata` is the default telemetry-safe payload.
- `summary` adds generated size/secret summaries for content and error fields.
- `full` is for trusted hooks and still applies known-secret redaction plus size limits.

## `agent_execute`

Emitted when a configured agent is selected for work.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "agent": "reviewer"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-agent_execute",
  "type": "agent_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "agent": "reviewer"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-agent_execute",
  "type": "agent_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "agent": "reviewer"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-agent_execute",
  "type": "agent_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `assistant_message`

Emitted after an assistant response is appended.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-assistant_message",
  "type": "assistant_message",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "role": "assistant",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-assistant_message",
  "type": "assistant_message",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "role": "assistant",
  "content_summary": "content redacted bytes=49",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-assistant_message",
  "type": "assistant_message",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "role": "assistant",
  "content": "The build passed after updating the test fixture.",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `command_execute`

Emitted when Atteler starts a local command.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "provider": "codex",
    "source": "llm_tool",
    "tool_call_id": "call_123"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-command_execute",
  "type": "command_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "provider": "codex",
    "source": "llm_tool",
    "tool_call_id": "call_123"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-command_execute",
  "type": "command_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "content_summary": "content redacted bytes=20",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "command": "go test ./pkg/events",
    "cwd": "/home/alice/project",
    "provider": "codex",
    "source": "llm_tool",
    "tool_call_id": "call_123"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-command_execute",
  "type": "command_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "content": "go test ./pkg/events",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `command_output`

Emitted when local command output is available.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "partial": "false",
    "sequence": "1",
    "source": "llm_tool",
    "stream": "stdout",
    "tool_call_id": "call_123"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-command_output",
  "type": "command_output",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "partial": "false",
    "sequence": "1",
    "source": "llm_tool",
    "stream": "stdout",
    "tool_call_id": "call_123"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-command_output",
  "type": "command_output",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "content_summary": "content redacted bytes=25",
  "error_summary": "error redacted bytes=13",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "command": "go test ./pkg/events",
    "cwd": "/home/alice/project",
    "partial": "false",
    "sequence": "1",
    "source": "llm_tool",
    "stream": "stdout",
    "tool_call_id": "call_123"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-command_output",
  "type": "command_output",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "content": "$ go test ./pkg/events\nok",
  "error": "exit status 1",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `context_add`

Emitted when a local reference is added to LLM context.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "bytes": "1200",
    "kind": "file"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-context_add",
  "type": "context_add",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "bytes": "1200",
    "kind": "file"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-context_add",
  "type": "context_add",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "bytes": "1200",
    "kind": "file",
    "path": "/home/alice/project/README.md"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-context_add",
  "type": "context_add",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `context_manifest`

Emitted before an LLM request with context audit metadata.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "context_manifest": "{\"schema_version\":1,\"included_reference_count\":1}",
    "context_summary": "agent=1,file=1",
    "estimated_tokens": "640",
    "included_reference_count": "1",
    "model_context_window_checked": "true",
    "request_kind": "chat",
    "schema_version": "1"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-context_manifest",
  "type": "context_manifest",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "context_manifest": "{\"schema_version\":1,\"included_reference_count\":1}",
    "context_summary": "agent=1,file=1",
    "estimated_tokens": "640",
    "included_reference_count": "1",
    "model_context_window_checked": "true",
    "request_kind": "chat",
    "schema_version": "1"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-context_manifest",
  "type": "context_manifest",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "context_manifest": "{\"schema_version\":1,\"included_reference_count\":1}",
    "context_summary": "agent=1,file=1",
    "estimated_tokens": "640",
    "included_reference_count": "1",
    "model_context_window_checked": "true",
    "request_kind": "chat",
    "schema_version": "1"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-context_manifest",
  "type": "context_manifest",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `error`

Emitted when an LLM request or session operation fails.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-error",
  "type": "error",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-error",
  "type": "error",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "error_summary": "error redacted bytes=26",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-error",
  "type": "error",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "error": "provider returned HTTP 429",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `file_read`

Emitted when Atteler reads a user or project file.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "bytes": "1200",
    "kind": "file"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-file_read",
  "type": "file_read",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "bytes": "1200",
    "kind": "file"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-file_read",
  "type": "file_read",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "bytes": "1200",
    "kind": "file",
    "path": "/home/alice/project/README.md"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-file_read",
  "type": "file_read",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `file_write`

Emitted when Atteler writes a local file.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "kind": "session"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-file_write",
  "type": "file_write",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "kind": "session"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-file_write",
  "type": "file_write",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "kind": "session",
    "path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-file_write",
  "type": "file_write",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `provider_retry`

Emitted when provider retry lifecycle state changes.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-provider_retry",
  "type": "provider_retry",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",

  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-provider_retry",
  "type": "provider_retry",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-provider_retry",
  "type": "provider_retry",

  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `route_decision`

Emitted when model routing selects or rejects candidates.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "candidate_count": "3",
    "estimated_cost": "0.0004",
    "phase": "estimated",
    "provider_count": "2",
    "rejected_count": "2",
    "selected": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
    "warning_count": "0"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-route_decision",
  "type": "route_decision",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "candidate_count": "3",
    "estimated_cost": "0.0004",
    "phase": "estimated",
    "provider_count": "2",
    "rejected_count": "2",
    "selected": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
    "warning_count": "0"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-route_decision",
  "type": "route_decision",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "content_summary": "content redacted bytes=53",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "candidate_count": "3",
    "estimated_cost": "0.0004",
    "phase": "estimated",
    "provider_count": "2",
    "rejected_count": "2",
    "selected": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
    "warning_count": "0"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-route_decision",
  "type": "route_decision",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "content": "{\"selected\":\"openai/gpt-4.1-mini\",\"rejected_count\":2}",
  "payload_mode": "full",
  "redacted": true
}
```

## `session_end`

Emitted when an interactive or one-shot session ends.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "agent_loop_budget": "{\"max_iterations\":4}"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-session_end",
  "type": "session_end",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "agent_loop_budget": "{\"max_iterations\":4}"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-session_end",
  "type": "session_end",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "agent_loop_budget": "{\"max_iterations\":4}"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-session_end",
  "type": "session_end",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```

## `tool_execute`

Emitted when Atteler invokes a provider or tool.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "option_adjustments": "0",
    "provider": "codex",
    "tool": "shell.run"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-tool_execute",
  "type": "tool_execute",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "option_adjustments": "0",

    "tool": "shell.run"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
```

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "option_adjustments": "0",
    "provider": "codex",
    "tool": "shell.run"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",

}
```

## `user_message`

Emitted after a user message is appended to a session.

Schema version: `1`

### `metadata` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-user_message",
  "type": "user_message",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "role": "user",
  "payload_mode": "metadata",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `summary` example

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-user_message",
  "type": "user_message",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "role": "user",
  "content_summary": "content redacted bytes=46",
  "payload_mode": "summary",
  "redacted": true
}
```

### `full` example

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "context_references": "README.md"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z",
  "schema_version": 1,
  "event_id": "evt-doc-user_message",
  "type": "user_message",
  "session_id": "session-123",
  "session_path": "/home/alice/.atteler/sessions/session-123.json",
  "agent": "reviewer",
  "model": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
  "role": "user",
  "content": "Please review @README.md before running tests.",
  "payload_mode": "full"
}
```
